title: viola × bissellii
intro: Viola × bissellii, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a plant that is a cross between Viola sororia and Viola tricolor. It is a perennial flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola × bissellii include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Viola × bissellii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
